    addPaper(User, Researcher, String, List, String, String, int, int, String, LocalDate) - Method in class app.service.ResearchService
    Creates a paper, adds it to a researcher's profile, and stores it in the system.

    Adds a participant to the project if they satisfy researcher requirements.
